headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays took down the Detroit Tigers 2-1 in a thrilling road victory, led by Yohendrick Piñango's 2-hit, 1-home run performance. The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 win over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles 13-3, with Keibert Ruiz leading the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Brendan Donovan (Seattle Mariners) who was placed on the 10-day injured list with a left groin muscle strain. Other notable injuries include Jack Dreyer (Los Angeles Dodgers) with left shoulder discomfort, and Tommy Nance (Toronto Blue Jays) with right forearm discomfort.

The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired Eric Lauer from the Toronto Blue Jays in a trade for cash. The Athletics traded Junior Perez to the Chicago White Sox for LHP Jackson Nove, while also trading RHP Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for 2B Alika Williams and RHP Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays edged out the Detroit Tigers 2-1, securing a crucial win on the road. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 1 run.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 2-4 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks with 2 RBI, while Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Marlins 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with several players making notable contributions. Xavier Edwards and Yandy Díaz led the Rays' offense, while Otto Lopez and Jakob Marsee had standout performances for the Marlins.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Nationals 7-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-3 victory over the Washington Nationals, with multiple players contributing to the win. Gunnar Henderson, Coby Mayo, Colton Cowser, Jeremiah Jackson, James Wood, Luis García Jr., and Jacob Young were among the impact hitters for the Orioles.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Donovan on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners third baseman Brendan Donovan has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain, effective retroactive to May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **Lauer Joins Dodgers in Latest Trade**
top_news.summary: Eric Lauer has been traded to the Los Angeles Dodgers, marking the latest move in a busy offseason. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired cash in exchange for the left-handed pitcher.
